role: Software Engineering Intern — Customer Solutions Developer
description_md:
- Translated customer requirements into automated technical workflows; engineered RESTful API integrations and an SQLite offline-first architecture to ensure robust, reliable customer-facing experiences.
- Built real-time monitoring dashboards on AWS (CloudWatch, EC2) tracking service health, API latency, and error rates; collaborated cross-functionally with design, engineering, and product teams.
- Improved system observability and reduced manual incident triage time through automated alerting pipelines and structured logging across cloud-hosted microservices.
